channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: aka-kika/hig-mcp
item.description: MCP server serving Apple Human Interface Guidelines as structured design tokens for AI coding agents — post-WWDC25 system colors, Liquid Glass constraints, SwiftUI mappings. — ⭐20, Python

item.title: berkal749/mcp-discord-mod
item.description: A lightweight MCP server for Discord server moderation — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: luckeyfaraday/frontier-orchestrator
item.description: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code: MCP server + skill that keeps Claude as lead engineer while delegating backend work to OpenAI Codex and frontend/design work to Kimi — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: FaramarzKowsari/ai-api-playbook
item.description: Companion source code for AI APIs in Practice, a visual engineering book on multimodal AI, agents, RAG, evaluation, governance, and production-ready products. Book DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21431944 · Softw — ⭐4, Python

item.title: appautomaton/pi-arcweld
item.description: An auditable local workspace for Pi: pinned upstream source, curated extensions, bounded MCP tooling, and a reproducible external runtime. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: golam74/MCP_SERVER
item.description: — ⭐3, Python

item.title: twz007/java-obs-agent
item.description: Framework-agnostic Java observability sidecar agent: chat with a live JVM via MCP/web UI (metrics, slow calls, errors, logs, thread dumps, method traces). Self-hosted, attachable (Arthas-style). Apach — ⭐3, Java

item.title: WendyAi2005/codex-comsol-bridge
item.description: Community-built Codex–COMSOL bridge using officially supported MATLAB MCP and LiveLink integration layers, with native multiphysics API access, task-level execution, same-model Desktop observation, an — ⭐3, MATLAB

item.title: mergeos-bounties/mt4-mcp
item.description: mt4-mcp — MCP server for MetaTrader 4 account, quotes, and orders — ⭐3, Python

item.title: ethira-dev/mizpah
item.description: Local log explorer with a token-optimized MCP server. — ⭐3, Rust

item.title: Crymfox/YTGlean
item.description: YouTube transcript aggregation, summarization, and digest system with MCP server for AI agents. — ⭐3, Go

item.title: rocky007cn/ace-memory
item.description: Give every AI tool persistent memory. Free. Local. Self-improving. Zero cloud, zero API keys, 1 dependency. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Ruisi-Lu/github-loop-engineering-skill
item.description: GitHub-native Loop Engineering skill: evidence-gated Issues and Projects workflows over the official GitHub MCP Server. — ⭐9, n/a

item.title: SingLinkLabs/singchat-mcp
item.description: Free live chat and AI support agent. Set it up from Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, or Grok. No signup. — ⭐8, n/a

item.title: Get-Concord-AI/concord-mcp
item.description: Shared work-state for coding agents: claim work, leave handoffs, and generate review packets before PRs, over MCP. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: autozw/gda-mcp-server
item.description: 安卓逆向工具gda-mcp-server 减少jadxmcp那样的内存压力 — ⭐4, Python

item.title: EvAlssment/boxkite
item.description: Self-hostable sandbox for agent code execution — SandboxManager, control-plane, 4 SDKs, MCP server, running inside real Kubernetes pod isolation — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Theo-Gkisis/mcpdockery
item.description: An MCP server that gives Claude hands-on control of Docker — containers, images, compose stacks, and volumes. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: desktop-commander/remote-desktop-commander
item.description: Official remote MCP server for Desktop Commander — connect claude.ai, ChatGPT, Cursor and more to your own computer over OAuth — ⭐3, n/a

item.title: MendesCorporation/ai-promo-video
item.description: A skill and MCP server that enables AI agents to autonomously create complete promotional videos, including scripts, visuals, editing and final export. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: Jayantkhandebharad/MCP-LMS-OSS
item.description: The gole of this project is to build the MCP server around the open sourse learning management platform, also this will act as reference for the blog on MCP related blog on jayantkhd.vencel.app — ⭐3, Python

item.title: vshulcz/deja-vu
item.description: Memory layer for coding agents: search, MCP recall, auto-context, secret redaction, stats, share and sync over the session logs Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, aider, Antigravity, Gr — ⭐366, Go

item.title: alexpilotto/uxon-ai
item.description: UXON is an MCP server and API that lets AI agents and developers create landing pages, run A/B experiments, and track conversions across domains. — ⭐23, n/a

item.title: siemd2/reel-relay
item.description: Share an Instagram reel to Claude and have it watch, research, and build what it shows. Self-hosted MCP connector (yt-dlp + ffmpeg + Groq Whisper). — ⭐10, Python

item.title: richarvey/OmniMem
item.description: Self-hosted semantic memory for AI Agents. Persistent sessions, experience scoring, and a graveyard for dead ends, backed by knowledge acquired from the RSS you read and stored in a Valkey vector sear — ⭐9, Python

item.title: mr-sanjai-offl/google-forms-mcp
item.description: Production-grade MCP server for Google Forms, Google Drive & Google Sheets. Build, automate, and manage forms using AI-powered workflows and complete Google Workspace integration. — ⭐7, Python

item.title: NousC/opennous
item.description: The context graph for agentic GTM teams. Unify the data scattered across your GTM tools into one identity-resolved account any agent reads in a single call. — ⭐7, TypeScript

item.title: IlyasKhallouki/hypruse
item.description: Computer use for Hyprland - MCP server giving AI agents native hands on your Wayland desktop. No ydotool, no root, no portals. — ⭐6, Python

item.title: Facetomyself/ruyi-mcp
item.description: Community MCP server for ruyiPage browser automation, network inspection, fingerprint analysis, and WebDriver BiDi trace workflows. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: KawhiWei/nino-agent
item.description: Nino Agent 是一个 API-first、多语言可演进的 Agent Harness 项目。当前可执行版本使用 Python 3.12，提供通用 Orchestrator、受控 Specialist ReAct Worker、共享 Agent/Skill 契约、多 MCP ToolProvider、SQLite 多轮会话和 Loop Engineering。独立的 .NET MCP Ser — ⭐6, Python
